name: preset-agent-skills
description: Preset agent skill packages split by surface: direct API workflows, MCP tool workflows, and CLI/`sup` workflows.

plugins.name: preset-api-skills
plugins.description: Preset API skills for explicit direct API workflows. Do not use for MCP-only work.

plugins.name: preset-mcp-skills
plugins.description: Preset MCP skills for Superset MCP tool workflows. Do not use for direct API work.

plugins.name: preset-cli-skills
plugins.description: Preset CLI skills for shell, scripting, and CI/CD workflows driven by the `sup` CLI (PyPI package `superset-sup`). Use only for CLI workflows; do not use for MCP-only work, and do not use as a substitute for direct HTTP/SDK code.
